bead.title: Stage 1.13: CRITICAL spec sweep verification
bead.description: Verification bead. Run: `grep -riE '(react|vite|tanstack|react-router|minisearch|MSW)' docs/ library/ website/ CLAUDE.md README.md cli/cmd/CLAUDE.md 2>/dev/null`. Paste the FULL output into this bead's completion note. Classify every match: (a) historical/explicitly-superseded → OK; (b) intentional with justification → OK; (c) stale → MUST be fixed in this bead before closing. See docs/plan-svelte-migration.md Stage 1 bead #13.
bead.acceptance: (1) Completion note contains the complete grep output. (2) Every match is classified (a), (b), or (c). (3) Zero category-(c) matches at close time. (4) If any (c) matches were found, they were fixed in this bead's commit before closing.

events.body:
SD-022-gql-svelte-migration.md legitimately contains ~14 matches for react/vite/tanstack/minisearch that are NOT stale references.

They are ALL either (a) historical framing ("migrating FROM the React stack") or (b) deletion-target table rows naming what to remove. The doc is the migration north-star and needs to reference the old stack to describe what is being replaced.

When running the grep sweep for this bead, include SD-022 in the expected-match set:
grep -riE "(react|vite|tanstack|minisearch)" ... | grep -v SD-022-gql-svelte-migration.md

Or classify any SD-022 match as category (a) historical-OK in the completion note.

Per opus review of dfd4af5 commit: these matches were reviewed and approved.
events.source: allowlist note from SD-022 opus review
events.summary: Allowlist SD-022 intentional historical refs when running the spec sweep
